sectionHint: Choose one of two cloud actions below when you need them.
uploadSubtext: Upload entries from this device to the cloud

upload.success: Backed up {{count}} entries to the cloud

pullSubtext: Download and merge with this device; cloud wins on conflicts

pull.confirmMessage: Cloud entries will merge with this device. If the same entry exists on both sides, the cloud version wins (you can recover entries deleted on this device). Entries only on this device stay. Continue?

pendingMessage: A sync is already in progress; backup will retry when it finishes

status.error: Last sync failed — please try again
